overall.description: Cinematic gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 depicting a journey on the Night City metro system. The clip opens with exterior golden hour views of futuristic skyscrapers and holographic advertisements from an elevated train, then transitions to the train's interior revealing passengers, digital route displays, and neon lighting.

scene_state.functional_zone: elevated train route through downtown commercial district

events.description: train passes large holographic Vargas billboard with health warning on building facade
bright sun flare appears between skyscrapers creating dramatic lens flare and shadows
camera turns from exterior city view to interior of train car

agents.ego_description: riding the elevated metro train through the city center, observing futuristic architecture and holographic advertisements

entered.detail: futuristic high-rise building with illuminated yellow windows and dark metal facade
enclosed metal walkway with glass panels connecting two buildings
large vertical digital advertisement displaying VARGAS with health warning text and fist imagery
vertical advertisement showing a reclining figure with 16+ age rating
distant dome-shaped building visible across the water on the horizon

segments.scene_description: The segment shows a first-person view from an elevated train moving through a futuristic cyberpunk city during golden hour. The camera passes towering glass skyscrapers connected by pedestrian skybridges, with large holographic advertisements covering building facades. The sun creates dramatic flares between buildings as the train progresses along the Arasaka Line, with a coastal dome structure visible in the distant background.

scene_state.functional_zone: metro train interior with passengers on Arasaka Line

events.description: view transitions from exterior cityscape to interior train car revealing seated passengers
bright sunlight streams through train windows creating moving shadows across the floor and seats
train passes through covered station section causing exterior view to temporarily darken

agents.ego_description: seated inside the metro train cabin, observing fellow passengers and the digital route information displays

notable_agents.action: seated passenger with blonde hair looking down at an object in their hands
standing passenger holding onto overhead pole wearing dark jacket and cap

entered.detail: wooden slatted bench seats with metal frames, some occupied by passengers
illuminated LED sign showing Arasaka Line, destination, and time 07:17
digital display above windows showing rotating advertisements and news broadcasts
vertical metal poles with orange hand grips for standing passengers
crumpled paper and discarded items visible on the train floor near the seats

segments.scene_description: The camera turns inward to reveal the train's interior cabin with sparse passengers seated on wooden benches. Digital displays show the Arasaka Line route information while overhead screens play advertisements. Sunlight streams through the windows creating dynamic shadows across the floor. The camera pans to show different sections of the car, including standing passengers holding poles and litter scattered on the ground, before the train passes through a darker station section.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement that transitions from a sweeping exterior view of a futuristic cityscape into the intimate, lived-in interior of a moving train. It begins by gliding past towering glass skyscrapers and pedestrian skybridges under a golden hour sun, with holographic advertisements and a distant coastal dome framing the horizon. As the train progresses along the Arasaka Line, the camera turns inward, shifting from the dramatic outdoor light flares to the cabin's interior where sunlight streams through windows to create dynamic shadows. The scene then expands to reveal passengers on wooden benches and digital route displays before panning across litter-strewn floors and standing commuters. Finally, the bright interior atmosphere dims as the train passes through a darker station section.
